mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.title, s.category, CASE s.category WHEN 1 THEN '奇幻校园' WHEN 2 THEN '悬疑推理' WHEN 3 THEN '浪漫物语' WHEN 4 THEN '搞笑日常' WHEN 5 THEN '科幻未来' ELSE '未知' END AS categoryName, s.status, CASE s.status WHEN 1 THEN '进行中' WHEN 2 THEN '已完结' WHEN 3 THEN '已归档' ELSE '未知' END AS statusName, s.paragraph_count AS paragraphCount, s.participant_count AS participantCount, s.total_likes AS totalLikes, s.is_recommended AS isRecommended, s.creator_id AS creatorId, u.nickname AS creatorNickname, u.avatar AS creatorAvatar, s.create_time AS createTime, LEFT(s.first_paragraph, 100) AS firstParagraphPreview FROM story s LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON s.creator_id = u.id WHERE s.creator_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.create_time DESC

SELECT s.id, s.title, s.category, CASE s.category WHEN 1 THEN '奇幻校园' WHEN 2 THEN '悬疑推理' WHEN 3 THEN '浪漫物语' WHEN 4 THEN '搞笑日常' WHEN 5 THEN '科幻未来' ELSE '未知' END AS categoryName, s.status, CASE s.status WHEN 1 THEN '进行中' WHEN 2 THEN '已完结' WHEN 3 THEN '已归档' ELSE '未知' END AS statusName, s.paragraph_count AS paragraphCount, s.participant_count AS participantCount, s.total_likes AS totalLikes, s.is_recommended AS isRecommended, s.creator_id AS creatorId, u.nickname AS creatorNickname, u.avatar AS creatorAvatar, s.create_time AS createTime, s.update_time AS updateTime, LEFT(s.first_paragraph, 100) AS firstParagraphPreview, sc.paragraph_count AS myParagraphCount, sc.points AS myContribution FROM story s LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON s.creator_id = u.id INNER JOIN story_contribution sc ON s.id = sc.story_id AND sc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.update_time DESC

SELECT s.id, s.title, s.category, CASE s.category WHEN 1 THEN '奇幻校园' WHEN 2 THEN '悬疑推理' WHEN 3 THEN '浪漫物语' WHEN 4 THEN '搞笑日常' WHEN 5 THEN '科幻未来' ELSE '未知' END AS categoryName, s.status, CASE s.status WHEN 1 THEN '进行中' WHEN 2 THEN '已完结' WHEN 3 THEN '已归档' ELSE '未知' END AS statusName, s.paragraph_count AS paragraphCount, s.participant_count AS participantCount, s.total_likes AS totalLikes, s.is_recommended AS isRecommended, s.creator_id AS creatorId, u.nickname AS creatorNickname, u.avatar AS creatorAvatar, s.create_time AS createTime, LEFT(s.first_paragraph, 100) AS firstParagraphPreview FROM story s LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON s.creator_id = u.id INNER JOIN story_favorite sf ON s.id = sf.story_id AND sf.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sf.create_time DESC

SELECT sc.user_id AS userId, u.nickname, u.avatar, sc.points, sc.paragraph_count AS paragraphCount, sc.like_received AS likeReceived, sc.key_point_count AS keyPointCount FROM story_contribution sc LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON sc.user_id = u.id WHERE sc.story_id = #{storyId} ORDER BY sc.points DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM story WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM story WHERE status = #{status}
